case_title: CONCEPCION LINDO ET AL VS. CONCEPCION "KONI" LINDO ET AL

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CONCEPCION LINDO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party prepare order. Proposed order must be in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)
